2605.26089.title: Channel-wise Vector Quantization
2605.26089.paper_summary: We present Channel-wise Vector Quantization (CVQ), a novel image tokenization paradigm that replaces patch-wise tokens with channel-wise tokens. Unlike conventional vector quantization, which assigns a discrete token to each patch feature vector, CVQ quantizes each channel of the feature map. This formulation represents an image as discrete levels of visual details, rather than as a grid of spatial patches. Based on CVQ, we introduce a new visual autoregressive framework with "next-channel prediction". Instead of rendering images patch by patch in raster order, our Channel-wise Autoregressive (CAR) model predicts image channels sequentially, producing progressively enriched visual details. Specifically, it first sketches global structure and then refines fine-grained attributes, akin to a human artist's workflow. Empirically, we show that: (1) CVQ achieves 100% codebook utilization with a 16K+ codebook size without any bells and whistles, and substantially improves reconstruction quality over conventional VQ; and (2) CAR attains a DPG score of 86.7 and a GenEval score of 0.79, demonstrating strong effectiveness for text-to-image generation.
2605.26089.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了通道向量量化（CVQ），這是一種新穎的影像標記化範式，將區塊式標記替換為通道式標記。與傳統的向量量化不同，後者為每個區塊特徵向量分配一個離散標記，CVQ則對特徵圖的每個通道進行量化。這種表述將影像表示為離散的視覺細節層次，而不是一個空間區塊的網格。基於CVQ，我們引入了一個新的視覺自回歸框架，具有「下一通道預測」的功能。我們的通道自回歸（CAR）模型不是按區塊逐一渲染影像，而是按順序預測影像通道，逐步產生更豐富的視覺細節。具體而言，它首先勾勒出全局結構，然後細化細緻屬性，類似於人類藝術家的工作流程。實證結果顯示：（1）CVQ在不使用任何花俏技術的情況下，實現了100%的碼本利用率，碼本大小達到16K以上，並顯著提高了重建質量，相較於傳統VQ；（2）CAR達到了86.7的DPG分數和0.79的GenEval分數，顯示出在文本到影像生成方面的強大有效性。
2605.26089.author: Wei Song et.al.
2605.26089.authors: Wei Song, Tianhang Wang, Yitong Chen, Tong Zhang, Zuxuan Wu, Ming Li, Jiaqi Wang, Kaicheng Yu
